title: Enhanced Performance and Visuals
description: A mod that boosts your fps by a lot, while also adding quality of life features and visual mods as well!
body:

# Description

This is a performance modpack that improves Performance, Visuals and even some some Quality of Life mods!

This mod is perfect for you that have an outdated computer and need the extra fps for a silky smooth playing experiance!

 

Huge FPS Boost:

70FPS > 370FPS at 1440p resolution! 285% Improvement!

 

Faster Boot time:

Game boots up in under 5 seconds and loads a world in 3 seconds! (May be higher or lower depending on pc specs)

 

Enhanced Visuals:

Cool water and gravity effected blocks animations. With the Fresh Animations resourcepack included in the modpack all mobs will have cool animations and come to life even more!

There is also Distant Horizons mod allowing you too set render distance to crazy lengths with minimal performance loss!

 

Feel free to give feedback how i can improve the modpack!
